function.name: add_ui_fact
function.description: Add a UI behavioral fact to the clickproof store. Call this when an agent has observed a confirmed interaction between a UI element and its outcome in a specific app version.

context.description: Optional UI context, e.g. 'reports-page'. Omit if unknown.

function.name: query_ui_facts
function.description: Query UI behavioral facts for a specific application. Call this at session start to load known facts about the target app before interacting with its UI.

app_version.description: Optional version filter, e.g. '2025.11'. Omit to get all versions.

min_score.description: Minimum confidence score threshold in [0.0, 1.0]. Default 0.5.

function.name: record_observation
function.description: Record an observation confirming or refuting a previously stored UI behavioral fact. Call after each agent interaction to keep confidence scores accurate.

fact_id.description: The 16-character ID of the UIFact being observed.

confirmed.description: True if the fact still holds; false if the behavior has changed.

agent_run_id.description: Optional identifier for this agent run, for tracing.

function.name: bootstrap_ui_context
function.description: Get a text summary of all known UI facts for an application, suitable for injection into an agent system prompt. Call this before starting a computer-use session.
